overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi survival horror game. The player character explores a dimly lit prison quarters, interacts with a handheld datapad to review audio logs, then exits into a sterile industrial corridor. The environment features dark metallic surfaces, teal lighting accents, and futuristic UI elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: confined quarters with beds and workstation

agents.ego_description: walking around the small room, examining the beds, desk, and wall equipment

entered.detail: bed with dark sheets against the right wall
second bed partially visible on the left side
white desk with monitor and keyboard
large window emitting bright white light behind the desk
medical or environmental control panel with colored buttons
tall blue cylindrical tank near the corner
framed picture or poster on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves around a dimly lit, compact living quarters with two beds and a workstation. The room features industrial paneling, a bright window behind the desk, and various wall-mounted equipment. The character explores the space, walking between the beds and approaching the desk area.

events.description: character picks up handheld datapad from the desk and activates it

agents.ego_description: holding and operating a handheld datapad, navigating through audio logs and system menus

entered.detail: futuristic tablet device displaying audio logs and system interfaces with red UI theme
stack of books or binders visible behind the device

segments.scene_description: The view shifts to a close-up of the character's hands holding a datapad. The device screen displays an audio log interface with waveform visualizations and menu options. The background shows the desk surface and books, while the rest of the room is no longer visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with numbered cell doors

events.description: character puts away the datapad and begins walking toward the exit
character opens the door and exits the quarters into the corridor

agents.ego_description: leaving the quarters, opening the metal door, and entering the industrial corridor with horizontal lighting

entered.detail: metal door with small window leading to the corridor
long horizontal fluorescent light fixtures on the corridor walls
built-in bench or seating along the corridor wall
dark metallic wall panels with integrated lighting

segments.scene_description: After putting away the datapad, the character walks toward the exit door, opens it, and steps into a narrow industrial corridor. The corridor features horizontal light strips, numbered cell doors, and dark metallic walls with a distinct teal lighting tone, contrasting with the dimmer quarters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic interior of a dimly lit living quarters into a sterile, teal-hued industrial corridor. It begins with the character navigating a compact room filled with industrial paneling and beds, moving steadily toward a workstation illuminated by a bright window. As the character stops at the desk, the perspective shifts into a close-up of a handheld datapad displaying an audio log interface with waveform visualizations. The scene then pulls back as the device is put away, following the character toward the exit door. Finally, the camera passes through the doorway and expands into a narrow hallway defined by dark metallic walls, numbered cell doors, and glowing horizontal light strips.
